subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath created, from His exalted Word, sublime letters, and hath taken their essence through the ordinances of His wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی خلق من کلمته العلیا حروفات عالیات و اخذ جوهرها بتدبیرات حکمته
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
